entity_id.description: Analytics ID returned by the ask-eddy response. Required to associate feedback with an ask-eddy query.

is_liked.description: Set to `true` if the user liked the AI response, and `false` if the user disliked the response.

comments.description: Optional user-provided feedback or suggestions about the AI response.

notify_me_about_changes.description: Set to `true` if the user wants to be notified when there is a response to their feedback.

feedback_provider_email.description: Email address of the user submitting the feedback. Required if `notify_me_about_changes` is set to `true`.

need_more_information.description: User needs more information than what was provided in the AI response.

difficult_to_understand.description: The AI response was difficult for the user to understand.

irrelevant_content.description: The AI response was not relevant to the user's query.

incorrect_source_reference.description: The source references in the AI response were incorrect or misleading.

missing_information.description: Important information was missing from the AI response.

dont_like_style.description: The user did not like the style of the AI response.

others.description: The user's feedback does not fall under the predefined categories.

comments.description: Indicates whether the user has provided additional comments.

additional_feedback_info.description: Additional details about the user’s feedback. Helps categorize user feedback and respond effectively.

feedback_sub_type.description: Set to `0` if the user did not receive a response to their query. Set to `1` if they received a response but were not satisfied with it.
